sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Vine/Chain/Rope Climbing
special_mechanics.description: DK Jr. can grab vines, chains, and ropes to climb higher on screen. Can slide down vines or climb faster by holding two vines simultaneously.

special_mechanics.name: Fruit Physics
special_mechanics.description: DK Jr. can knock down pieces of fruit that destroy every enemy they touch before falling off bottom of screen

special_mechanics.name: Platform Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch from one vine/chain/rope to another to dodge enemies during climbing sequences

tier_notes: Tier 2 - No precise physics parameters documented in sources. Game mechanics described qualitatively. Controller input mechanics documented (diagonal input handling in Revision 1 vs Revision 0). Platform hitbox adjustments noted (Stage 2 vine climbing fix) but no numerical physics values available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Donkey Kong Jr. (NES, Famicom Disk System)
